text: Prime Sherman Oaks light and bright second floor corner front unit in a well-maintained complex. Two bedrooms, Two bathrooms, 1230 sq.ft. of living space. Spacious master bedroom with plenty of closet space plus a walk-in closet and remodeled bathroom.  Includes two open courtyards, one with a large pool, controlled entrance, elevator, subterranean tandem parking, and community laundry on each floor.  Walk to Ventura Blvd. for shopping, dining, entertainment, and banking, close to the freeway and minutes to Westside via canyons or freeways.

Welcome to this beautiful single-story home with a view! 3 bedroom 2.5 bathrooms with a 2-car attached garage. Largest floor plan in the community and rarely available. This home sits up high perched on an elevated lot on a quiet cul de sac! This amazing home offers privacy and views! Ideal layout with comfort and space in mind. One of the most sought after communities in North Escondido surrounded by the beautiful Castle Creek golf course! Tall soaring ceiling in the spacious living room with a rock fireplace and charming window seat to soak in the views. Wrap around patio with a gated entrance. Rich hard wood floors, granite kitchen counter tops and upgraded bathrooms make this home move in ready. Ideal layout with an oversized primary suite with a retreat and cozy patio to enjoy your morning coffee. Jack and jill bathroom for the guest suites plus a powder room for company.  This home is very unique with all the dark wood window trim and base boards giving the home world class charm and warmth. Tour this beauty today!

Welcome to a sun-filled top-floor retreat in the heart of Westlake Village, where an abundance of natural light and elegant upgrades combine to create the ideal blend of style and comfort. This beautifully refreshed condo features new wide-plank European white oak hardwood floors that flow seamlessly throughout the open-concept living, dining, and kitchen areas, perfect for modern living. The kitchen boasts sleek granite countertops and stainless-steel appliances that cater to everyday needs and entertaining alike. Vaulted ceilings and large windows amplify the bright and airy ambiance, while a sliding glass door open to a private balcony offering serene tree views and a peaceful outdoor escape. The generous primary suite is a true haven, complete with an ensuite bathroom and a large walk-in closet. A second bedroom and additional bath provide flexible options ideal for guests, a home office, or a hobby studio. The unit is also perfectly positioned in the back of the community, where there is no street noise, and has two individual parking spaces. Residents enjoy resort-style living with access to community amenities, including sparkling pools, lush common areas, a BBQ, and convenient guest parking. Situated in an award-winning school district, with top-rated elementary, middle, and high schools nearby, this condo offers both exceptional value and lifestyle. This move-in-ready, light-filled home is an opportunity not to be missed. Schedule your private showing today!

Welcome to this spacious and open layout home with soaring ceilings, located in the highly sought Fluer De Mont neighborhood of San Ramon. The heart of the home is the open-concept kitchen and family room combo. The formal living and dining rooms are easily accessed from kitchen perfect for casual gatherings and family dinners. The kitchen features modern amenities, seamlessly flowing into the family room where you can enjoy cozy evenings by the fireplace.  Recent updates include new flooring upstairs and paint throughout and newly renovated 1.5 bathroom. The home also benefits from new Central AC and furnace heating for year-round comfort and comes with a fully paid off Tesla Solar saving electric bills.  Situated in a gated community within the San Ramon Valley Unified School District. Easy access to hight 680, parks, the Iron Horse Trail, Bishop Ranch business park, and plenty of shopping and dining options at the City Center. Welcome to this fabulous home in Fletcher Hills! Located on a large lot at the end of a cul-de-sac, this property has an open floor plan with bright natural light throughout. The large family kitchen is perfect for entertaining while enjoying your guests in the open living space. The large backyard is ideal for parties or simply enjoying peace and privacy. Located near great schools with easy freeway access and shopping, this beauty is not to be missed!

This beautifully updated 2 bedroom, 2.5 bathroom home offers just under 1800 sq ft of thoughtfully designed living space. The main level features new vinyl plank flooring, a private bedroom with an en-suite bathroom as well as two additional flexible spaces that can be used as a family room, office space, and/or a garage. The second floor showcases hardwood floors and an open-concept layout between the spacious kitchen and living room, complete with an electric fireplace. The kitchen itself has a large island, wine fridge, dishwasher, and plenty of storage.The spacious primary suite features a walk-in closet, a dual vanity bathroom, a large shower with seating, and a private balcony.  A convenient half bath and stacked laundry are also located upstairs. The updated stairwell off the living room leads to a brand-new private deck with gas and water lines and electrical outlets—ideal for entertaining. Additional highlights include new Milgard windows, plenty of parking in the garage and/or carport, and ample storage under the stairs.

Located in Brentwood, this home blends modern luxury, thoughtful design, and seamless indoor-outdoor living. Soaring ceilings and abundant natural sunlight throughout. Generous living areas and expansive Fleetwood pocket glass doors provide the perfect setting for entertaining & everyday living. 2069 Lewis St., Hercules, CA 94547 Charming Victorian Village–style home in the desirable Hercules Bayside Community, built by John Laing in 2005. This inviting residence offers a perfect blend of character, comfort, and convenience, all centered around a picturesque community “Central Park” where neighbors gather and dogs roam freely. Enjoy low monthly HOA dues and a paseo location that enhances the neighborhood’s walkable, village-like feel. The home welcomes you with grand vaulted ceilings, elegant bay windows, cherry laminate flooring, and classic oak banisters. Thoughtfully designed with excellent separation of space, it features 3 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, and a 2-car attached garage. Ideally located near major retailers, scenic walking trails, and quick access to Highways 80 and 4, making commuting to Napa, San Francisco, and Sacramento easy and convenient. This home offers both lifestyle and location—perfect for those seeking comfort, community, and connectivity.

Rare lifestyle property in desirable West Lancaster/Quartz Hill area on ~1.25 acres of flat, usable land. This single-story 4 bed, 2 bath home offers comfortable living space and an incredible backyard featuring a custom in-ground pool and spa with extensive stamped concrete hardscape, grassy areas, and mature palms—perfect for entertaining. Property includes an oversized solar system for energy efficiency, detached garage with covered porch ideal for workshop or storage, and corrals for livestock. Plenty of room for RVs, toys, additional structures, or potential ADU (buyer to verify). Quiet rural setting just minutes from shopping, schools, and freeway access. A rare combination of land, pool, solar, and ranch-style amenities all in one property.

Welcome to this beautifully remodeled, FULLY FURNISHED TURNKEY home featuring 2 spacious bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, and a versatile bonus office—perfect for working from home or hosting guests. Step inside to an open and airy living space with wide-plank flooring, a stunning floor-to-ceiling tiled fireplace, and oversized sliding doors that flood the room with natural light and open to a private patio.

Expertly renovated by Tincopa Inc Design in partnership with DPS Capital Investments, this home showcases a high standard of craftsmanship and thoughtful attention to detail throughout.

The modern kitchen is outfitted with sleek finishes, quartz countertops, new appliances, and designer lighting. Each bedroom offers its own en-suite bathroom, with the primary suite featuring a luxurious soaking tub and spa-inspired finishes. A convenient half bath is also available for guests.
Every aspect of this home has been thoughtfully upgraded—from fresh paint and new windows to contemporary fixtures and hardware. Whether you’re relaxing by the fireplace, entertaining in the open-concept living area, or working in the dedicated office, this home effortlessly blends modern design with everyday functionality.

Located in the highly desirable Desert Falls Country Club, residents enjoy 24-hour guard-gated security, a semi-private 18-hole championship golf course, a well-equipped fitness center, tennis and pickleball courts, and a resort-style pool and spa. With beautifully maintained grounds and a vibrant social atmosphere, this community offers the perfect balance of leisure and luxury in the heart of Palm Desert.

Rare opportunity to own a turn-key twin homes with one shared wall. Legally a duplex, 3235 is a much larger 3BR 2.5BA with high-ceiling oversize living room and separate family room. The additional unit (3233) is a smaller 3BR 2.5BA. Each home has dedicated laundry room and an attached two-car garage home with a separate address and separate utility meters. Its unique setting offers many opportunities.  Built in 1996, both 3235 and 3233 feature high-ceiling living rooms surrounded by greenery; open floor-plan flows from living into dining and kitchen effortlessly; primary bedroom suites offer walk-in closets; plus large laundry rooms, balconies and more. 3235 also has a family room and an outdoor deck area. Both units were recently remodeled from top to bottom making them move-in ready.  The property is located in a peaceful cul de sac in a great Santa Rosa neighborhood, close to many shops, stores and restaurants on Mendocino Avenue. A must-see!

Welcome to 60 W South Street, a well-maintained and move-in-ready home offering comfort, functionality, and a welcoming layout in a convenient Tracy location. This inviting residence features a private backyard with a covered patio—perfect for relaxing evenings.   Inside, the spacious living room is filled with natural light and highlighted by vaulted ceilings and a cozy fireplace, creating a warm and open atmosphere. The kitchen flows seamlessly into the dining area and is equipped with stainless steel appliances, ample counter space, and storage designed for everyday living. A dedicated indoor laundry room and direct access to the attached two-car garage add everyday convenience.   Upstairs, the home offers three comfortable bedrooms and two full bathrooms, including a primary suite with dual sinks and a modern stand-up shower. Thoughtful upkeep is evident throughout, making this home ready for its next owner while still offering room to personalize.   Located just minutes from downtown Tracy, shopping, dining, parks, and nearby transit options, this home combines neighborhood charm with commuter-friendly access. Discover this beautifully upgraded single-story pool home in the sought-after Spring Valley Lake community. Additional bedrooms are generously sized, and the laundry room is conveniently located indoors. The gated backyard provides abundant space for outdoor activities, and is large enough for an ADU, RV, or boat parking. Kitchen includes newer appliances, pantry and mountain views. Relax in the private, enclosed patio or enjoy the community pool and spa only steps away. Welcome to this exquisite upper-level 1-bedroom, 1-bath + LOFT residence rich in designer upgrades and timeless elegance located in the prestigious Santa Fe Community of Valencia where an exceptional location meets refined living. Ideally situated near Valencia Town Center Mall, upscale dining, boutique shopping, scenic paseos, parks, trails, and convenient freeway access. The home features Carrara marble countertops, custom cabinetry, crown molding, smooth vaulted ceilings, recessed lighting, upgraded interior doors, and bespoke built-ins throughout—including a stylish bar, cabinetry beneath the staircase, and custom storage in the primary suite. The loft offers a mirrored-door closet and serves as a versatile space ideal for an office, retreat, or guest area. The chef-inspired kitchen is appointed with newer stainless steel appliances and a sleek breakfast counter for casual dining and entertaining. The spa-like bathroom showcases a luxurious walk-in shower with bench seating, dual-sink vanity, indoor laundry, and a spacious walk-in closet. A private balcony, accessible from both the living room and bedroom, provides a serene outdoor escape. Additional amenities include a private one-car garage, an assigned parking space, and resort-style HOA offerings such as a pool, spa, water, and trash service. No Mello-Roos. This impeccably maintained home exudes pride of ownership and offers an elevated lifestyle in one of Valencia’s most sought-after communities. Truly a rare opportunity.
